methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser.parse
documentation:
Create a Parser object with specified file_path and content.
If content is None then, it is loaded from the file_path method.
Otherwise, file_path is only used for reporting errors.

methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser._iter_step_func_decorators
documentation: Find functions with step decorator in parsed file.

methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser._step_decorator_args
documentation: Get arguments passed to step decorators converted to python objects.

methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser.iter_steps
documentation: Iterate over steps in the parsed file.

methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser._find_step_node
documentation: Find the ast node which contains the text.

methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser.refactor_step
documentation:
Find the step with old_text and change it to new_text.
The step function parameters are also changed according
to move_param_from_idx.  Each entry in this list should
specify parameter position from old

methods.name: getgauge.parser.Parser.get_code
documentation: Return current content of the tree.
